omitted_declarations.policy_reference: How we share your information. In addition to the main text of this policy, in the event we use information such as User Content and video content on our Services as part of our advertising and marketing campaigns to promote the Services, your personal information contained in such information may be disclosed to the recipients of such advertising or marketing content.
